name: M&m Peanut Butter and Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the margarine, peanut butter, and sugars until smooth.
3. Add the eggs and vanilla extract, then beat until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually combine the flour, oats, baking soda, and salt with the creamed mixture.
5. Stir in the M&M semi-sweet chocolate candies until evenly distributed throughout.
6. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 8-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute on the baking sheets before transferring them to wire cooling racks.
9. Store in a tightly covered container.
10. Makes about 3 dozen 2 1/2 inch cookies.
